mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REPORTS ( REPORT_ID, REPORT_TYPE, CONTENT_ID, REPORTER_ID, TARGET_ID, REPORT_REASON, REPORT_DATE, STATUS ) VALUES ( SEQ_REPORT_ID.NEXTVAL, #{reportType}, #{contentId}, #{reporterId}, #{targetId}, #{reportReason}, SYSDATE, 'PENDING' )
mapper.select: SELECT REPORT_ID, REPORT_TYPE, CONTENT_ID, REPORTER_ID, TARGET_ID, REPORT_REASON, REPORT_DATE, STATUS FROM REPORTS ORDER BY REPORT_DATE DESC
SELECT REPORT_ID, REPORT_TYPE, CONTENT_ID, REPORTER_ID, TARGET_ID, REPORT_REASON, REPORT_DATE, STATUS FROM REPORTS WHERE REPORT_ID = #{reportId}
